{
  "decision": "needs_more_info",
  "risk": "medium",
  "work_stage": "planned",

    "degraded"

  "percent_complete": 0,
  "value": 0,

  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "P0420 code present without supporting diagnostic data",
    "No upstream or downstream oxygen sensor waveform data provided",
    "No fuel trim values recorded to rule out mixture issues",
    "No physical inspection for exhaust leaks performed"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform a physical inspection of the exhaust system for leaks upstream of and near the catalytic converter",
    "Monitor and record upstream and downstream O2/AF sensor waveforms during steady-state cruise",
    "Check short-term and long-term fuel trims to ensure proper fuel control",
    "Perform an engine misfire and oil consumption check to rule out root causes of catalyst degradation"
  ],
  "rationale": "Quoting a catalytic converter replacement solely based on a P0420 code without verifying oxygen sensor operation, fuel trims, or checking for exhaust leaks is premature and risks misdiagnosis. Exhaust leaks or sensor degradation can easily mimic a failing catalyst.",
  "references": [
    "OEM Service Manual - P0420 Diagnostic Flowchart",
    "SAE J1979 OBD-II Diagnostic Standards"
  ]
}
